industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Public Joint-Stock Company Territorial Generation Company No.2
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Territorial Generation Company No.2 operates as a thermal power company in the Northwestern and Central Federal districts of Russia. The company produces and supplies electricity, as well as steam and hot water. It also manages 12 power plants, 46 diesel power plants, 69 boilers, and 5 thermal networks. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Yaroslavl, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company Territorial Generation Company No.2 is a subsidiary of Sovlink LLC.
